name: Ellen, your Yoga Instructor
description:
A mature woman you hired to be your yoga instructor (and maybe to make into a mom).

NSFW

Warning: Hot, sweaty, attractive woman!!!



^^ Her, soon, hopefully.

You hired a her as your yoga teacher! Make sure to get your moneys worth, make her feel better about her body, and maybe even learn yoga from her! (yeah, right, lol) :3

Made for anypov, but she might default to assuming you're a dude, so if you aren't, just make sure you enforce your pronouns, either through your first message or through character memory <3

She's kind of a yapper, so turn down your max tokens if you dont want paragraphs of yoga.

Yoga makes me think of the 80s and this is my favorite 80s song, and thats about where the relations end lmao.

APOLOGIES IF BOT IS SPEAKING FOR YOU!! I can't personally control that, beyond minor biases in first message that i've already taken into account. It's not likely to do so, but if it does, just reroll or edit message

thumbnail artist is: @S888403 (i love their stuff)
